data.content: Implemented parent-rolling propagation to child beats. When a parent beat is rolling, its children now show 'Rolling...' with pulse animation but no stop button. Take\! button and Shift+S keyboard shortcut are blocked for these children. Changes in beat-columns.tsx (parentRollingBeatIds option, action/state column rendering) and beat-table.tsx (parentRollingBeatIds computation, keyboard guard). All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, tests). Build failure is pre-existing.
